docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,166.20 FILED BY TRAN, JESSICCA LEE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE DENTAL PRACTICE OF INESSA SOSIS DDS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) INESSA SOSIS FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE DENTAL PRACTICE OF INESSA SOSIS DDS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 SERVED MAY-15-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE DENTAL PRACTICE OF INESSA SOSIS DDS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAN, JESSICCA LEE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE DENTAL PRACTICE OF INESSA SOSIS DDS PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HER BURDEN OF PROOF BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT DENTAL TREATMENT PERFORMED BY DEFENDANT FELL BELOW THE STANDARD OF CARE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2025 - JUDGMENT.
